concepts_used.title: 整数规划与 0-1 规划
concepts_used.how_used: 将仓库选址问题建模为0-1整数规划，每个州是否建仓库用0-1变量表示，目标是最小化仓库总数，约束为每个州至少被一个仓库覆盖。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: In conjunction with graph theory, we apply 0-1 programming to solve for the optimal solutions.

concepts_used.title: 贪心算法与集合覆盖
concepts_used.how_used: 使用贪心算法求解最小仓库覆盖问题，每次选择能覆盖最多未覆盖州的仓库位置，直到所有州被覆盖。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: On top of that, we apply Greedy Algorithm and computer analytic technique to give the optimal solution.

concepts_used.title: 最短路径算法（Dijkstra、Floyd）
concepts_used.how_used: 构建0-1矩阵表示州之间是否能在一天内地面运输到达，基于距离或运输时间，用于确定覆盖关系。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We simplify the problem by constructing a 27-by-27 0-1 matrix. We fill the matrix with 1 or 0 according to whether the two concerned states can be mutually reached in a one-day ground shipping.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 明确列出三条假设：仓库设在州首府、忽略偏远地区、数字购物者比例与人口成正比。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: 2-1 Assumptions: (1) Every state’s radius of UPS delivery is given by this state’s capital’s zip code. (2) When determining whether a state can be fully reached, we ignore some trivial areas... (3) We take the population of a state to predict a state’s population of digital shoppers.

concepts_used.title: 引言写作方法
concepts_used.how_used: 以信件形式开头，重述问题并给出推荐方案，包含背景、问题陈述和结果概要。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Dear sir: ... I am writing to show my keen interest to serve in your company... Please let me restate the problem... The final results our team is able to produce is that the warehouse location which comprises minimum warehouse quantity is...

concepts_used.title: 地理信息可视化
concepts_used.how_used: 使用地图可视化标注偏远区域（如缅因州东北部、密歇根州北部），辅助说明假设。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Fig. 1 (the North-Eastern part of Maine) and Fig. 2 (the Northern part of Michigan) are shown in brown.

concepts_used.title: 中心化/归一化/标准化
concepts_used.how_used: 使用人口比例作为数字购物者数量的代理变量，隐含归一化处理。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We take the population of a state to predict a state’s population of digital shoppers. Furthermore, we assume the number of a state’s digital shoppers in right proportion to its population.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 通过调整税收条件（一般销售税和服装税）来检验模型解的稳定性，发现仓库数量未显著增加。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We surprisingly found that the number of warehouses do not increase significantly. To come up with this solution, we consider various variables such as digital shoppers in each state...
